title: Yinchuan, Ningxia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Yinchuan, Ningxia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Yinchuan is a city in Ningxia with a population of 2,859,000. Capital of Ningxia, a walled city on the edge of the Gobi Desert, known for its Muslim Hui culture and wine-producing region.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
